header.title: Schedule Generator
header.subtitle: Generate a schedule of sessions for any activity

form.title: Schedule Details
form.eventNamePlaceholder: e.g., Morning Workout, Team Standup, Study Session
form.selectDays: Select the days of the week for your sessions
form.holidaysDescription: Select dates to exclude from the schedule

validation.meetingsRequired: Number of sessions must be at least 1
validation.daysRequired: Please select at least one day of the week
validation.timeRequired: Please enter both start and end times
validation.endDateAfterStart: End date must be on or after the start date
validation.noSessionsInRange: No sessions fall within the selected range
validation.invalid: Please check your input and try again

export.errorNoSessions: Please select at least one session to export

emptyState.title: No Schedule Yet
emptyState.description: Fill in the form and click "Generate Schedule" to create your event calendar

footer.text: Perfect for personal routines, team schedules, and recurring events
